modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Security certificate error on USD website in Firefox.

full_description_text: 
During a live chat session, a user reported encountering a security certificate error when accessing the USD website. The message indicated that the connection was not secure, suggesting that the website owner had configured it improperly. As a result, Firefox prevented the user from connecting to the site to protect their information.
short_description: Security certificate error on USD website in Firefox.
